training_status: competitive/avid gym-goer, former competitive snowboarder and runner

benefits.description: Back pain and sciatic pain significantly reduced; pain from fractured lower spine, scoliosis, and slipping disks reduced to 'a faint whisper'; quick recovery from pulling something during weight lifting
Stomach no longer has pain; digestive issues improved; reduced gut inflammation
Significant reduction in abdominal bloating and inflammation; stomach appears flatter in photos
Increased energy and happiness; bigger spark in energy noted after incorporating peptides
Reduced abdominal distention and bloating; no actual weight loss but visual improvement in stomach appearance

protocol_notes: Stack described as 'Wolverine Stack' (BPC-157/TB-500). Started at end of November 2025. BPC/TB administered as a pre-mixed blend at 1.5 mg daily, injected subcutaneously near belly button and sometimes in glutes. 5-amino-1MQ (not a peptide) also used at 4-5 mg per day split between 2 doses. Clean diet with primarily salmon. Daily workout routine. Photos taken Dec 20, 2025 and Jan 29, 2026 showing ~40-day timeline.
